name: ATHENA 1000W diode laser
shortDescription: 1000W professional diode laser with 4 wavelengths and smart software. Stable, predictable, cost-efficient — the goddess of control and precision.
description: "The strength born of knowledge." ATHENA was not the goddess of brute force, but the symbol of strategy, precision and conscious operation. The ATHENA diode laser represents this: stable operation, predictable results, control in every situation. Has a goddess ever held your hand during work? Now you may have the chance.
metaTitle: ATHENA 1000W diode laser | Smart software, stable precision
metaDescription: ATHENA – 1000W professional diode laser with 4 wavelengths and a smart treatment system. Stable, predictable, cost-efficient.

videoDescription.headline: ATHENA – The harmony of feminine strength and precision
paragraphs: ATHENA was not the goddess of brute force, but the symbol of strategy, precision and conscious operation. The ATHENA diode laser represents this: stable operation, predictable results, control in every situation.
You can also count on her wisdom: thanks to the smart software, you don't have to determine which skin type can be treated with which treatment setting. ATHENA is by your side and helps.

afterVideo.text: Have a question about ATHENA? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Want to see ATHENA in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Come to our showroom in Érd and try it yourself!

final.headline: Interested in the ATHENA 1000W diode laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if it's the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why choose ATHENA?
featureRows.subtitle: 1000W stable power, 4 wavelengths, smart software – control and precision at a new level.

features.title: Stable 1000W power – professional level
features.description:
1000W output power is more than enough for you to work at a professional level and achieve impressive results. Most average diode lasers operate around 600W — 1000W is already a level above, meaning faster and more efficient work.

What this means:

Faster work
Greater efficiency
More stable operation
More comfortable treatments

features.title: 4 wavelengths – for every skin type
features.description: The combination of four different wavelengths (755 / 808 / 940 / 1064 nm) provides broad treatment flexibility in a single device — effective on every hair type and every skin tone.

features.title: Smart software – the goddess of wisdom
features.description: You don't have to determine which skin and hair type can be treated with which setting. ATHENA's smart software automatically detects and optimizes the parameters. It's as if a goddess were holding your hand during work.
features.highlight: Knowledge is power — especially when it's automatic.

features.title: Cost-efficient, smart investment
features.description: ATHENA is a machine that is not overdone, but a smartly built investment. A perfect choice if you incorporate it alongside another service (as a beautician, as a complement to skincare), or if you are a safety player and want a predictably operating system.

training.headline: Operator training – part of the purchase
training.intro: The price of the ATHENA device includes the comprehensive operator training. You will learn the safe and efficient use of the device as well as the parameters of the smart software.
items: The device's operating principle and safety considerations
Use of the smart software and parameters
Optimal settings according to skin and hair type
closingParagraphs: Live model practical training with own model +59.990 Ft – particularly recommended for those who want to master the treatment protocols in a real treatment situation.
The basic operator training is free with the machine purchase, and we issue a FAR certificate for successful completion.
training.freeText: Basic training FREE with machine purchase!

expertQuote.quote: ATHENA is the perfect entry-level professional machine. The stable 1000W power, the smart software and the predictable operation are an ideal choice for beauticians who want to provide serious treatments without jumping into the top-tier price level.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

functionCards.name: Smart software
functionCards.description: Automatic skin and hair type recognition.

faq.question: What does 1000W mean for ATHENA?
faq.answer: Most average diode lasers operate around 600W — these are entry/mid category. 1000W is already a level higher: faster work, greater efficiency, more stable operation. More than enough for professional-level work.

faq.question: What can the smart software do?
faq.answer: It recognizes the skin and hair type and automatically optimizes the treatment parameters. You don't have to determine which setting to use — ATHENA helps. It's like an expert standing next to you.

faq.question: Who is ATHENA recommended for?
faq.answer: For beauticians who want to incorporate it alongside another service (as a complement to skincare). For safety players who are looking for a predictable, stable system. For new entrants who want a cost-efficient, smart investment.

faq.question: What is the difference between ATHENA, OLYMPIA and HELIOS?
faq.answer: All three are different configurations of the same platform: ATHENA (1000W) — precision, control, cost-efficient entry. OLYMPIA (1200W) — the smart choice, value-for-money champion. HELIOS (1600W) — top tier, maximum performance.

faq.question: How quickly does it pay off?
faq.answer: An average client takes a diode laser treatment worth approximately 50,000 Ft. Since ATHENA is available at a more realistic price, the return can be even faster — it can turn a profit after just a few months.

faq.question: What is included in the price?
faq.answer: The price includes comprehensive operator training, FAR certificate, 2-year warranty and the Hungarian-language user manual. Delivery time is 2-6 weeks. For an exact price, request a consultation.
